name: Add how to program a Hik-vision NVR, including Hik-Connect

subtasks.name: Is the house valued >R20M
Do they need the complete package (>4 systems or a cinema)
Do they have the budget?
Objections...
subtasks.notes:
It's expensive. Yes it is, but it'll be your best thing in the house.
    I'm not technical. That's why we would be employed, have you ever tried dealing with an IT guy, alarm guy, TV guy, sound guy and had to design all of these things for a house? How would you get it to work together? Who's going to make sure that all of the cabling is done correctly?
    I don't like home automation. We do all of the separate systems, in a way that is intuitive, consolidated and designed properly. Solid simple systems.

Send snag prep email to client
notes:
Dear

We are preparing to begin with the installation of your equipment. Once we have completed the physical installation, we will be programming and configuring it to suit your preferences.

The configuring takes some time. And there's a period of snagging and fine tuning, to get the electronics fully settled in the building. Sometimes things might not work as expected during this time. Please just drop us an email so that we can add it to the snag list.

We prepare as much as we can, to fast-track this process. 

And we'll do our best to iron out all of the kinks as quickly as possible.

Thanks for your patience during this time. We're really looking forward to handing over your completed smart system.

Best Regards

D-One.
